rationale: The current translation is superior to the candidate. The candidate (a92e3ccbbd78286bf93bc6f75925ad2df9c00c83) has a critical failure in Challenge index 5, where it truncated the option text (e.g., "new Intl.DateTimeFormat('\}" instead of the full code string), making the quiz unusable. The current version correctly preserves the code options and provides a natural Japanese translation that follows the required structure and tone.
